title.en: Linux task_struct Design Philosophy: From Process Descriptor to Unified Task Model
title.zh: 深入研究 Linux task_struct 的设计哲学：从进程描述符到统一任务模型

summary.en: A layered study of how Linux uses task_struct as the central index for schedulable tasks, connecting scheduling, memory, files, signals, credentials, namespaces, cgroups, I/O, and observability.
summary.zh: 从统一 task 模型解释 Linux task_struct 如何连接调度、内存、文件、信号、权限、命名空间、cgroup、I/O 和观测等内核子系统。

readingDirection.en: Read this when studying Linux process and thread semantics, clone resource sharing, kernel scheduling entities, or the boundary between OS threads and user-mode lightweight threads.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在理解 Linux 进程线程模型、clone 资源共享、内核调度实体或用户态轻量线程边界时阅读。
